jd:
移动 APP 测试工程师招聘。负责移动 APP 测试、自动化测试、接口测试、白盒测试、兼容性测试、性能测试、回归测试、缺陷跟踪。

Required skills (each repeated 5 times for TF top-K ranking):
Python Python Python Python Python — automation scripting.
Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest — interface test framework.
MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL — backend data validation.
Linux Linux Linux Linux Linux — backend services and logs.
Git Git Git Git Git — version control.
JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA — defect tracking.

需要熟悉自动化测试、接口测试、白盒测试、Web测试、APP测试、敏捷测试、回归测试、测试体系、测试用例、测试计划、缺陷跟踪、报告输出、CI/CD、Appium、Jenkins、Git 等工具。2+ years mobile QA required.
